name: linear-admin
description: Codex plugin for admin-grade Linear automation through a local GraphQL path.

interface.shortDescription: Admin-grade Linear setup through a local GraphQL path
interface.longDescription: Use a local-only MCP server to mint Linear OAuth app tokens from 1Password-backed refs, inspect the GraphQL schema, and automate shared views, templates, and project updates without browser automation.
defaultPrompt: Create shared Linear views for a project
Post a project update through the app-token GraphQL path
Inspect the Linear GraphQL schema for a feature
